subject: Fermi GBM trigger 151221730 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 151221730/472411854
at 17:30:50.36 UT on the 21 of December 2015, tentatively classified as GRB,
is in fact not due to GRB.  This trigger is due to V404 Cyg.�
